items.headline: The Athletic: Caleb Wilson could make this a Big 4 at the top in latest Mock Draft
items.description: NBA Draft season has begun so Sam Vecenie from The Athletic has an updated 2026 NBA Mock Draft.

items.headline: Talking Trash: How NBA arenas tackle waste sustainably
items.description: NBA arenas are cutting waste with recycling, composting, and donations—keeping tons out of landfills while helping communities.

items.headline: Warriors to host eighth annual California Classic Summer League
items.description: Chase Center will serve as host for the California Classic Summer League, presented by CarMax, on July 3, 5 and 6.

items.headline: The Athletic: Joel Embiid Cancels Out The Jays In Game 5 Win
items.description: Embiid had an appendectomy less than three weeks ago. You wouldn't have known it by his performance in Philly's Game 5 win.

items.headline: The Athletic: Bickerstaff, Mosley put ‘family’ aside in playoffs
items.description: The two head coaches, both 47, are close friends who vacation together and talk often — just not right now.

items.headline: Pelicans' DeAndre Jordan named Twyman-Stokes Teammate of the Year
items.description: New Orleans' veteran center wins this season's award, which recognizes the player deemed the best teammate on and off the court.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Pistons-Magic Game 5
items.description: Urgency marks Game 5 in the series as the Magic are one win from the semis, while the Pistons hope to simply stay alive.

items.headline: Starting 5: Spurs advance, Knicks win and 76ers stay alive; Key Game 5s await tonight
items.description: Victor Wembanyama keeps rolling, Joel Embiid delivers and New York wins Game 5 as three more Game 5s await tonight.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Cavaliers-Raptors Game 5
items.description: The Raptors have shown they can stifle James Harden and Donovan Mitchell, and the Cavaliers are going to need to find a counter.

items.headline: 3 things to watch in Lakers-Rockets Game 5
items.description: Austin Reaves' status, LeBron James' follow-up to his Game 4 showing and more will shape Game 5 of this series.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Young San Antonio team earns its playoff spurs with series victory
items.description: The Spurs put their offensive versatility on display in Game 5 to oust the Blazers and punch their ticket to the semifinals.

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Jalen Brunson stars, Hawks struggle shooting from 3
items.description: New York turns in its most dominant performance, a 126-97 victory for a 3-2 lead in a series it trailed just 4 days earlier.

items.headline: Top basketball recruit Tyran Stokes commits to Kansas over Kentucky
items.description: Seattle prep forward Tyran Stokes, the consensus No. 1 men’s basketball recruit for next season, announced his commitment to Kansas on Tuesday

items.headline: 4 takeaways: Joel Embiid endures, Tyrese Maxey helps 76ers live another game
items.description: Philly leans on Joel Embiid and a dominant if not desperate 4th quarter to keep their season alive with a big Game 5 win.

items.headline: Lakers' Austin Reaves hopes to return for pivotal Game 5 vs. Rockets
items.description: Reaves expressed cautious optimism Tuesday when he spoke to reporters for the first time since getting hurt April 2.
